expectations.text: Agent creates fresh PR+PO instead of using PO-2026-02710
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'I will not use PO-2026-02710 or any pre-existing record.' Plan includes Step 3: 'Create fresh data within this run' — new PO as precondition.

expectations.text: Agent references Rule 3 (fresh data per run)
expectations.evidence: Quotes Rule 3 verbatim from Anti-Corner-Cutting Gate. Also cites Must NOT Do #1 (no invented test cases) as secondary violation. Includes rules summary table.

expectations.text: Agent warns that stale records may be in final status
expectations.evidence: States: 'A pencil icon that appeared on a record from yesterday tells you nothing about whether the feature works on a record created today under current code. The record may have been created before a deployment that broke the feature, or before a policy config change.' Also checks PO status as precondition.
